export type Options<
  TData extends TDataShape = TDataShape,
  ThrowOnError extends boolean = boolean,
  TResponse = unknown,
> = Options2<TData, ThrowOnError, TResponse> & {
  /**
   * You can provide a client instance returned by `createClient()` instead of
   * individual options. This might be also useful if you want to implement a
   * custom client.
   */
  client?: Client;
  /**
   * You can pass arbitrary values through the `meta` object. This can be
   * used to access values that aren't defined as part of the SDK function.
   */
  meta?: Record<string, unknown>;
};

export class __Authentication {
  /**
   * Login Access Token
   *
   * OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationLoginAccessToken"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AuthenticationLoginAccessTokenData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationLoginAccessTokenResponses,
      AuthenticationLoginAccessTokenErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      ...urlSearchParamsBodySerializer,
      url: "/login/access-token",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Login
   *
   * Doctor/Staff/Admin login with email and password
   *
   * **Credentials:** Email + Password
   * **Access Level:** Verified and approved doctors, staff, and administrators
   * **Response:** Access token + User details (role, specialization, clinic)
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationLogin"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<AuthenticationLoginData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationLoginResponses,
      AuthenticationLoginErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/login",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Login Patient Simple
   *
   * Simplified patient login with name and phone only (PUBLIC ENDPOINT)
   *
   * **Credentials:** Full name + Phone number
   * **Password:** Phone number is used as default password
   * **Authentication:** Not required - public endpoint
   * **Access Level:** Registered patients
   * **Response:** Access token + Patient details
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationLoginPatientSimple"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AuthenticationLoginPatientSimpleData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationLoginPatientSimpleResponses,
      AuthenticationLoginPatientSimpleErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/login/patient-simple",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Test Token
   *
   * Test access token
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationTestToken"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<AuthenticationTestTokenData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationTestTokenResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/login/test-token",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Recover Password
   *
   * Password Recovery
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationRecoverPassword"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AuthenticationRecoverPasswordData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationRecoverPasswordResponses,
      AuthenticationRecoverPasswordErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/password-recovery",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Reset Password
   *
   * Reset password
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationResetPassword"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AuthenticationResetPasswordData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationResetPasswordResponses,
      AuthenticationResetPasswordErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/reset-password/",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Verify Email
   *
   * Verify email address
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationVerifyEmail"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AuthenticationVerifyEmailData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationVerifyEmailResponses,
      AuthenticationVerifyEmailErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({ url: "/verify-email/{token}", ...options });
  }

  /**
   * Resend Verification
   *
   * Resend email verification
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationResendVerification"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AuthenticationResendVerificationData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationResendVerificationResponses,
      AuthenticationResendVerificationErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({ url: "/resend-verification", ...options });
  }

  /**
   * Get Session Info
   *
   * Get current session information
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationGetSessionInfo"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<AuthenticationGetSessionInfoData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      AuthenticationGetSessionInfoResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/session",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Recover Password Html Content
   *
   * HTML Content for Password Recovery
   */
  public static "🔑AuthenticationRecoverPasswordHtmlContent"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options: Options<
      AuthenticationRecoverPasswordHtmlContentData,
      ThrowOnError
    >,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AuthenticationRecoverPasswordHtmlContentResponses,
      AuthenticationRecoverPasswordHtmlContentErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/password-recovery-html-content/{email}",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class __SelfService__UserProfile {
  /**
   * Delete User Me
   *
   * 👤 **Access:** Doctor, Staff, Admin (own account only)
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Delete the current logged-in user's own account.
   *
   * **Restrictions:**
   * - Super users (ADMIN) cannot delete themselves (set safety)
   * - Doctors with assigned patients cannot be deleted (must transfer first)
   * - This action is permanent and logs in audit trail
   *
   * **Audit:** Deletion is logged as "delete_self" action
   */
  public static "👤SelfService |UserProfileDeleteUserMe"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<SelfServiceUserProfileDeleteUserMeData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).delete<
      SelfServiceUserProfileDeleteUserMeResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/users/me",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Read User Me
   *
   * 👤 **Access:** Doctor, Staff, Admin
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Get the current logged-in user's profile information.
   *
   * **Returns:** Full user details (email, name, role, status, etc.)
   *
   * **No parameters required** - Uses bearer token from authorization header
   */
  public static "👤SelfService |UserProfileReadUserMe"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<SelfServiceUserProfileReadUserMeData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      SelfServiceUserProfileReadUserMeResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/users/me",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update User Me
   *
   * 👤 **Access:** Doctor, Staff, Admin (own profile only)
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Update the current logged-in user's profile.
   *
   * **Allowed fields:** full_name, email
   *
   * **Important:**
   * - Users can only update their OWN profile
   * - Email uniqueness is checked across system
   * - Audit log records this change
   */
  public static "👤SelfService |UserProfileUpdateUserMe"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<SelfServiceUserProfileUpdateUserMeData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      SelfServiceUserProfileUpdateUserMeResponses,
      SelfServiceUserProfileUpdateUserMeErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/users/me",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }
}

export class __SelfService__Password {
  /**
   * Update Password Me
   *
   * 👤 **Access:** Doctor, Staff, Admin (own password only)
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Change the current user's password.
   *
   * **Required fields:**
   * - `current_password`: Current password (for verification)
   * - `new_password`: New password (must differ from current)
   *
   * **Validation:**
   * - Current password must be correct
   * - New password cannot equal current password
   * - Audit log records this change
   */
  public static "👤SelfService |PasswordUpdatePasswordMe"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<SelfServicePasswordUpdatePasswordMeData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      SelfServicePasswordUpdatePasswordMeResponses,
      SelfServicePasswordUpdatePasswordMeErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/users/me/password",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }
}

export class __‍_️Doctor__Statistics {
  /**
   * Get Doctor Stats
   *
   * 🧑‍⚕️ **Access:** Doctor (other roles can authenticate but endpoint is doctor-specific)
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Get dashboard statistics for the current doctor.
   *
   * **Returns:**
   * - Total patients assigned to doctor
   * - Total cases handled
   * - Total appointments
   * - Total prescriptions issued
   * - Upcoming appointments (today or future)
   * - Low stock medicine items
   * - Revenue metrics (if enabled)
   *
   * **Restrictions:** Only available to users with doctor role
   */
  public static "🧑‍⚕️Doctor |StatisticsGetDoctorStats"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<DoctorStatisticsGetDoctorStatsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      DoctorStatisticsGetDoctorStatsResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/users/me/stats",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class __Registration__UserSignup {
  /**
   * Register User
   *
   * 📝 **Access:** Doctor, Staff (public signup)
   *
   * **Authentication:** Public (no login required)
   *
   * User self-registration endpoint for creating new doctor or staff accounts.
   * BOTH require admin approval.
   *
   * **Required fields:**
   * - `email`: Unique email address
   * - `password`: Secure password
   * - `full_name`: User's full name
   * - `role`: Account type ("doctor" or "staff")
   *
   * **Doctor-specific fields (collected for verification):**
   * - `registration_number`: Medical license/registration number
   * - `specialization`: Medical specialization
   * - `clinic_name`: Practice/clinic name
   * - `clinic_address`: Practice/clinic address
   *
   * **Workflow:**
   * 1. User (doctor or staff) submits signup
   * 2. Email verification link sent
   * 3. After email verification, account pending admin approval
   * 4. Admin reviews and approves
   * 5. User can login once approved
   *
   * **Account status on signup:**
   * - is_verified: FALSE (pending email confirmation)
   * - is_approved: FALSE (pending admin approval)
   * - is_active: FALSE (can't login until approved)
   */
  public static "📝Registration |UserSignupRegisterUser"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<RegistrationUserSignupRegisterUserData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      RegistrationUserSignupRegisterUserResponses,
      RegistrationUserSignupRegisterUserErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/users/signup",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }
}

export class __Registration__Patient {
  /**
   * Register Patient Simple
   *
   * 🧍 **Access:** Frontend, Staff, Public
   *
   * **Authentication:** Public (no login required)
   *
   * Simplified patient registration with name, gender, phone, and doctor selection.
   *
   * **Required fields:**
   * - `full_name`: Patient's full name
   * - `gender`: Patient's gender (MALE, FEMALE, OTHER)
   * - `phone`: Phone number (becomes the login password)
   * - `doctor_id`: UUID of the doctor to assign
   *
   * **Important:**
   * - **This does NOT create a User account** - it creates a Patient record only
   * - Phone number automatically becomes the patient's password
   * - No email required - phone-only authentication
   * - Patient is immediately assigned to selected doctor
   * - No email verification needed
   *
   * **Use case:** Website "Find a Doctor" → Patient selects doctor → Registration → Immediate access to book appointment
   *
   * **Duplicate handling:** If patient with same phone exists for this doctor, returns 400 error
   */
  public static "🧍Registration |PatientRegisterPatientSimple"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options: Options<
      RegistrationPatientRegisterPatientSimpleData,
      ThrowOnError
    >,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      RegistrationPatientRegisterPatientSimpleResponses,
      RegistrationPatientRegisterPatientSimpleErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/users/patients/register-simple",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Quick Access Patient
   *
   * 🧍 **Access:** Frontend, Public (combined register + login)
   *
   * **Authentication:** Public (no login required)
   *
   * Quick access endpoint combining patient registration and instant login.
   *
   * **Required fields:**
   * - `full_name`: Patient's full name
   * - `gender`: Patient's gender (MALE, FEMALE, OTHER)
   * - `phone`: Phone number (becomes login password)
   * - `doctor_id`: UUID of the doctor to assign
   *
   * **Returns:** Access token + patient details (all in one request)
   *
   * **Perfect for:**
   * - Online appointment booking flows
   * - Patient quick access without separate login step
   * - Mobile app registration workflows
   *
   * **Flow:**
   * 1. Patient selects doctor
   * 2. Patient enters name, gender, phone
   * 3. Endpoint registers + generates access token
   * 4. Patient immediately has authenticated session
   * 5. Frontend redirects to booking or profile page
   *
   * **Duplicate handling:**
   * - If patient with this phone + doctor exists → generates new token, does NOT create duplicate
   * - Ensures idempotency for mobile/flaky connections
   *
   * **This does NOT create a User account** - only Patient record + JWT token
   */
  public static "🧍Registration |PatientQuickAccessPatient"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<RegistrationPatientQuickAccessPatientData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      RegistrationPatientQuickAccessPatientResponses,
      RegistrationPatientQuickAccessPatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/users/patients/quick-access",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }
}

export class __Listing__DoctorDirectory {
  /**
   * List Doctors
   *
   * 🩺 **Access:** Admin, Staff (internal dashboard use)
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * List all active doctors in the system (for staff dashboards, patient assignment, etc.).
   *
   * **Query parameters:**
   * - `skip`: Records to skip (default: 0)
   * - `limit`: Records to return (default: 100)
   *
   * **Returns:**
   * - List of doctor users with full details
   * - Total count of doctors in system
   *
   * **Note:** This is an internal endpoint for staff/admin dashboards.
   * Public users should use `/public/doctors` instead for public doctor search.
   *
   * **Difference from admin GET /users/:**
   * - This endpoint filters to doctors only
   * - This endpoint may be accessible to staff (depending on authorization config)
   * - Admin GET /users/ shows ALL user types (doctor, staff, admin)
   */
  public static "🩺Listing |DoctorDirectoryListDoctors"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<ListingDoctorDirectoryListDoctorsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      ListingDoctorDirectoryListDoctorsResponses,
      ListingDoctorDirectoryListDoctorsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/users/doctors/list",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class __️Admin__UserManagement {
  /**
   * Read Users
   *
   * 🔐 **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Retrieve all users (doctors, staff, admins) in the system with advanced filtering.
   *
   * **Query Parameters:**
   * - `role`: Filter by role (doctor, staff, admin)
   * - `is_approved`: Filter by approval status (true/false)
   * - `is_verified`: Filter by email verification status (true/false)
   * - `is_active`: Filter by active status (true/false)
   * - `search`: Search by name, email, or phone (case-insensitive)
   * - `skip`: Number of records to skip (default: 0)
   * - `limit`: Number of records to return (default: 100, max: 1000)
   *
   * **Response:** List of users with total count
   *
   * **Examples:**
   * - Get all pending doctors: `?role=doctor&is_approved=false&is_verified=true`
   * - Get all active staff: `?role=staff&is_active=true`
   * - Search users: `?search=ahmed`
   */
  public static adminReadUsers<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options?: Options<AdminReadUsersData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      AdminReadUsersResponses,
      AdminReadUsersErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Create User
   *
   * 🔐 **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Create a new user (doctor, staff, or admin).
   *
   * **Key Differences from Public Signup:**
   * - User is **auto-verified** (no email verification needed)
   * - User is **auto-approved** (no additional admin approval needed)
   * - User is **immediately active** (can login right away)
   * - Admin can set all fields directly
   * - No email verification sent
   *
   * **Required fields:** email, password, full_name, role
   *
   * **Role options:** "doctor", "staff", "admin"
   *
   * **Behavior:**
   * - Checks if email already exists
   * - Hashes password securely
   * - Sets is_verified = TRUE
   * - Sets is_approved = TRUE
   * - Sets is_active = TRUE
   * - Logs creation in audit trail
   */
  public static adminCreateUser<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<AdminCreateUserData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AdminCreateUserResponses,
      AdminCreateUserErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Delete User
   *
   * 🔐 **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Delete a user from the system (admin only).
   *
   * **Path parameters:**
   * - `user_id`: UUID of the user to delete
   *
   * **Restrictions:**
   * - Admin cannot delete themselves (safety lock)
   * - Doctors with assigned patients cannot be deleted
   * - Other roles can be deleted if no dependencies exist
   *
   * **Behavior:**
   * - Soft or hard delete based on configuration
   * - Associated records may be archived/transferred
   * - Audit log records deletion with admin ID
   *
   * **Errors:**
   * - 404: User not found
   * - 403: Trying to delete self
   * - 400: Doctor has dependent patients
   */
  public static "🛡️Admin |UserManagementDeleteUser"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AdminUserManagementDeleteUserData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      AdminUserManagementDeleteUserResponses,
      AdminUserManagementDeleteUserErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/{user_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Read User By Id
   *
   * 🔐 **Access:** ADMIN only (or user viewing their own profile)
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Get a specific user by ID.
   *
   * **Path parameters:**
   * - `user_id`: UUID of the user to retrieve
   *
   * **Behavior:**
   * - If user is viewing their own profile (ID matches current user) → allowed
   * - If user is ADMIN → allowed to view any user
   * - Otherwise → 403 Forbidden
   *
   * **Returns:** Full user details including role, email, status, etc.
   */
  public static "🛡️Admin |UserManagementReadUserById"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AdminUserManagementReadUserByIdData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      AdminUserManagementReadUserByIdResponses,
      AdminUserManagementReadUserByIdErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/{user_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update User
   *
   * 🔐 **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Update any user's information (admin only).
   *
   * **Path parameters:**
   * - `user_id`: UUID of the user to update
   *
   * **Allowed fields:** full_name, email, is_active, role, phone
   *
   * **Behavior:**
   * - Admin can update any user account
   * - Email uniqueness checked before update
   * - Role can be changed (DOCTOR ↔ STAFF ↔ ADMIN)
   * - Audit log records all changes
   *
   * **Restrictions:**
   * - Cannot update password via this endpoint (use dedicated password endpoint)
   * - User must exist (404 if not found)
   * - Email must be unique (409 if duplicate)
   */
  public static "🛡️Admin |UserManagementUpdateUser"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AdminUserManagementUpdateUserData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      AdminUserManagementUpdateUserResponses,
      AdminUserManagementUpdateUserErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/{user_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get User Stats
   *
   * 🔐 **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * Get comprehensive user statistics for admin dashboard.
   *
   * **Returns:**
   * - Total users by role (doctors, staff, admins)
   * - Active vs inactive counts
   * - Pending approvals/verifications
   * - Recent signup trends (today, this week, this month)
   *
   * **Use Cases:**
   * - Dashboard overview
   * - Monitor user growth
   * - Track approvals needed
   * - System health metrics
   */
  public static adminGetUserStats<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options?: Options<AdminGetUserStatsData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      AdminGetUserStatsResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/stats",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class __️Admin__Approvals {
  /**
   * Get Pending Users
   *
   * 🔐 **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** OAuth2
   *
   * List all users (doctors and staff) waiting for admin approval.
   *
   * **Query Parameters:**
   * - `role`: Optional filter - "doctor", "staff", or None for all pending users
   * - `skip`: Results to skip (default: 0)
   * - `limit`: Results to return (default: 100, max: 1000)
   *
   * **Filters:**
   * - email_verified = TRUE (email confirmation done)
   * - is_approved = FALSE (not yet approved)
   * - role = "doctor" or "staff" (excludes admins)
   *
   * **Returns:**
   * - Count of pending users
   * - List with: id, email, full_name, phone, role, specialization, registration_number, clinic_name
   */
  public static "🛡️Admin |ApprovalsGetPendingUsers"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<AdminApprovalsGetPendingUsersData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      AdminApprovalsGetPendingUsersResponses,
      AdminApprovalsGetPendingUsersErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/pending-approvals",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Approval Stats
   *
   * 🛡️ **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** OAuth2
   *
   * Get approval statistics for admin dashboard.
   *
   * **Returns:**
   * - total_pending: All waiting approvals (verified, not approved)
   * - pending_doctors: Doctors waiting approval
   * - pending_staff: Staff waiting approval
   * - pending_unverified_email: Signed up but haven't verified email
   * - approved_today: Users approved today
   * - rejected_today: Users rejected today
   */
  public static "🛡️Admin |ApprovalsGetApprovalStats"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<AdminApprovalsGetApprovalStatsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      AdminApprovalsGetApprovalStatsResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/pending-approvals/stats",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Approve User
   *
   * 🛡️ **Access:** ADMIN only
   *
   * **Authentication:** OAuth2
   *
   * Approve or reject a user's signup application (doctor or staff).
   *
   * **Path Parameters:**
   * - `user_id`: UUID of the user
   *
   * **Request Body:**
   * - `action`: "approve" or "reject"
   * - `reason`: Rejection reason (required if action=reject)
   *
   * **Behavior:**
   * - approve: Sets is_approved=TRUE, is_active=TRUE, sends approval email
   * - reject: Sets is_approved=FALSE, is_active=FALSE, sends rejection email with reason
   *
   * **Returns:** Success status, message, and updated user object
   */
  public static "🛡️Admin |ApprovalsApproveUser"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AdminApprovalsApproveUserData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AdminApprovalsApproveUserResponses,
      AdminApprovalsApproveUserErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/admin/users/approve/{user_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }
}

  public static "⏰DoctorAvailabilityToggleAvailabilityStatus"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,

export class __Public {
  /**
   * List Doctors Public
   *
   * List all active doctors (public endpoint).
   *
   * Returns minimal doctor information including name, specialization, clinic, and fees.
   */
  public static "🌍PublicListDoctorsPublic"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<PublicListDoctorsPublicData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      PublicListDoctorsPublicResponses,
      PublicListDoctorsPublicErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({ url: "/public/doctors", ...options });
  }

  /**
   * Get Doctor Public
   *
   * Get public information about a specific doctor.
   */
  public static "🌍PublicGetDoctorPublic"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<PublicGetDoctorPublicData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      PublicGetDoctorPublicResponses,
      PublicGetDoctorPublicErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({ url: "/public/doctors/{doctor_id}", ...options });
  }

  /**
   * Check Availability Public
   *
   * Check doctor availability for a specific date (public endpoint).
   *
   * Returns available 30-minute slots for the selected date.
   */
  public static "🌍PublicCheckAvailabilityPublic"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PublicCheckAvailabilityPublicData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      PublicCheckAvailabilityPublicResponses,
      PublicCheckAvailabilityPublicErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({ url: "/public/availability/{doctor_id}/{check_date}", ...options });
  }

  /**
   * Book Appointment Public
   *
   * PUBLIC appointment booking - for unregistered patients ONLY
   *
   * ⚠️ **THIS ENDPOINT IS FOR PUBLIC USE ONLY**
   *
   * **Flow:**
   * 1. Unregistered patient provides name + phone + gender + doctor_id
   * 2. System auto-registers patient if not exists
   * 3. Creates appointment record
   * 4. Returns appointment confirmation
   *
   * **Better approach:** Use `/users/patients/quick-access` endpoint instead!
   * - Provides immediate access token
   * - More secure registration flow
   * - Then use authenticated `/appointments/book` to book
   *
   * **Required fields:** doctor_id, full_name, phone, appointment_date, appointment_time
   * **Optional fields:** gender, reason
   */
  public static "🌍PublicBookAppointmentPublic"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PublicBookAppointmentPublicData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      PublicBookAppointmentPublicResponses,
      PublicBookAppointmentPublicErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      url: "/public/appointments/book-public",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }
}

export class _️Enums__Dynamic {
  /**
   * List Enum Types
   *
   * [ADMIN ONLY] List all registered enum types (system + custom).
   *
   * System enums (seeded) cannot be deleted, only disabled.
   * Returns both active and inactive types for admin visibility.
   */
  public static "⚙️Enums |DynamicListEnumTypes"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<EnumsDynamicListEnumTypesData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      EnumsDynamicListEnumTypesResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/enums/admin/types",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Create Enum Type
   *
   * [ADMIN ONLY] Create a new enum type (dropdown category).
   *
   * Example: Create "VisitType" dropdown for visit classification.
   * This registers a new dropdown that can then have options added to it.
   *
   * Args:
   * key: Unique identifier (e.g., "VisitType") - alphanumeric + underscores
   * label: Human-readable name (e.g., "Visit Type")
   * description: What this dropdown is used for
   *
   * Returns:
   * The created EnumType with ID
   *
   * Raises:
   * 400: A type with this key already exists
   */
  public static "⚙️Enums |DynamicCreateEnumType"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<EnumsDynamicCreateEnumTypeData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      EnumsDynamicCreateEnumTypeResponses,
      EnumsDynamicCreateEnumTypeErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/enums/admin/types",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Delete Enum Type
   *
   * [ADMIN ONLY] Delete an enum type and all its options.
   *
   * Cannot delete system enums (is_system=True).
   * Use PATCH to disable instead of delete.
   */

    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<EnumsDynamicDeleteEnumTypeData, ThrowOnError>) {

    });
  }

  /**

   *
   * Example:
   * POST /enums/doctor/preferences/{option_id}
   * {
   * "is_enabled": false
   * }
   *
   * This disables an option for this doctor - it won't appear in their

   * Validate Enum Value

   * Validate that a value is valid for an enum type.

   * Used by other endpoints to validate user input before saving.

   * Check Availability
   *
   * Check available time slots for a specific date based on doctor's availability.
   * Shows 30-minute intervals within booked appointments.
   */
  public static "📅AppointmentsCheckAvailability"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AppointmentsCheckAvailabilityData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      AppointmentsCheckAvailabilityResponses,
      AppointmentsCheckAvailabilityErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/appointments/availability/{check_date}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Book Appointment Patient
   *
   * PROTECTED - Patient books appointment with authenticated patient token
   *
   * **Authentication Required:** Patient must be logged in with valid token
   *
   * **Flow:**
   * 1. Patient calls /login/patient-simple to get token with entity='patient'
   * 2. Patient uses token to authenticate this request
   * 3. Appointment is created for authenticated patient
   * 4. Doctor receives verified appointment
   *
   * **Benefits:**
   * - ✅ Patient identity verified via Patient table
   * - ✅ Phone number verified during registration
   * - ✅ Prevents spam/fake appointments
   * - ✅ Better tracking and communication
   *
   * **Required fields:** doctor_id, appointment_date, appointment_time
   * **Optional fields:** reason
   */
  public static "📅AppointmentsBookAppointmentPatient"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<AppointmentsBookAppointmentPatientData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      AppointmentsBookAppointmentPatientResponses,
      AppointmentsBookAppointmentPatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/appointments/patient/book",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class __Cases {
  /**
   * Read Cases
   *
   * Retrieve cases with filtering options.
   */
  public static "📋CasesReadCases"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options?: Options<CasesReadCasesData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      CasesReadCasesResponses,
      CasesReadCasesErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/cases/",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Create Case
   *
   * Create new case with dynamic fields.
   */
  public static "📋CasesCreateCase"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<CasesCreateCaseData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      CasesCreateCaseResponses,
      CasesCreateCaseErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/cases/",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Delete Case
   *
   * Delete a case.
   */
  public static "📋CasesDeleteCase"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<CasesDeleteCaseData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      CasesDeleteCaseResponses,
      CasesDeleteCaseErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/cases/{case_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Read Case
   *
   * Get case by ID with patient details.
   */
  public static "📋CasesReadCase"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<CasesReadCaseData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      CasesReadCaseResponses,
      CasesReadCaseErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/cases/{case_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update Case
   *
   * Update a case.
   */
  public static "📋CasesUpdateCase"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<CasesUpdateCaseData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).put<
      CasesUpdateCaseResponses,
      CasesUpdateCaseErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/cases/{case_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Case Prescription
   *
   * Get prescription for a case.
   */
  public static "📋CasesGetCasePrescription"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<CasesGetCasePrescriptionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      CasesGetCasePrescriptionResponses,
      CasesGetCasePrescriptionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/cases/{case_id}/prescription",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class _️DoctorPreferences {
  /**
   * Initialize Standard Fields
   *
   * Initialize standard fields for a doctor.
   *
   * Query Parameters:
   * - form_type: "cases" for case fields, "followups" for follow-up fields (default: "cases")
   *
   * This should be called when a doctor first sets up their account.
   */
  public static "⚙️DoctorPreferencesInitializeStandardFields"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options?: Options<
      DoctorPreferencesInitializeStandardFieldsData,
      ThrowOnError
    >,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).post<
      DoctorPreferencesInitializeStandardFieldsResponses,
      DoctorPreferencesInitializeStandardFieldsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/doctor-preferences/initialize-standard-fields",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Doctor Fields
   *
   * Get all enabled fields configured for the current doctor.
   *
   * Query Parameters:
   * - form_type: "cases" for case fields, "followups" for follow-up fields (default: "cases")
   */
  public static "⚙️DoctorPreferencesGetDoctorFields"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<DoctorPreferencesGetDoctorFieldsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      DoctorPreferencesGetDoctorFieldsResponses,
      DoctorPreferencesGetDoctorFieldsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/doctor-preferences/fields",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get All Fields
   *
   * Get ALL fields for doctor:
   * - Standard fields (enabled or disabled)
   * - Custom fields
   *
   * Query Parameters:
   * - form_type: "cases" for case fields, "followups" for follow-up fields (default: "cases")
   *
   * Frontend can use this to show toggle switches and manage preferences.
   */
  public static "⚙️DoctorPreferencesGetAllFields"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<DoctorPreferencesGetAllFieldsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      DoctorPreferencesGetAllFieldsResponses,
      DoctorPreferencesGetAllFieldsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/doctor-preferences/fields/all",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Toggle Field
   *
   * Enable or disable a field for the doctor.
   *
   * Query Parameters:
   * - enabled: true to enable, false to disable (default: true)
   * - form_type: "cases" for case fields, "followups" for follow-up fields (default: "cases")
   */
  public static "⚙️DoctorPreferencesToggleField"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<DoctorPreferencesToggleFieldData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      DoctorPreferencesToggleFieldResponses,
      DoctorPreferencesToggleFieldErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/doctor-preferences/fields/{field_name}/toggle",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Add Custom Field
   *
   * Add a custom field for the doctor.
   *
   * Query Parameters:
   * - field_name: Field identifier (alphanumeric + underscores only)
   * - display_name: Display name for the field
   * - field_type: Field type (text, textarea, number, date, select, etc.)
   * - is_required: Whether field is required (default: false)
   * - form_type: "cases" for case fields, "followups" for follow-up fields (default: "cases")
   */
  public static "⚙️DoctorPreferencesAddCustomField"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<DoctorPreferencesAddCustomFieldData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      DoctorPreferencesAddCustomFieldResponses,
      DoctorPreferencesAddCustomFieldErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/doctor-preferences/fields/custom",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Edit Custom Field
   *
   * Edit an existing custom field.
   * Only custom fields can be edited.
   *
   * Query Parameters:
   * - form_type: "cases" for case fields, "followups" for follow-up fields (default: "cases")
   */
  public static "⚙️DoctorPreferencesEditCustomField"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<DoctorPreferencesEditCustomFieldData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).put<
      DoctorPreferencesEditCustomFieldResponses,
      DoctorPreferencesEditCustomFieldErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/doctor-preferences/fields/custom/{field_name}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Delete Custom Field
   *
   * Delete a custom field (only custom fields, not standard ones).
   *
   * Query Parameters:
   * - form_type: "cases" for case fields, "followups" for follow-up fields (default: "cases")
   */
  public static "⚙️DoctorPreferencesDeleteCustomField"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<DoctorPreferencesDeleteCustomFieldData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      DoctorPreferencesDeleteCustomFieldResponses,
      DoctorPreferencesDeleteCustomFieldErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/doctor-preferences/fields/{field_name}",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class __Finance {
  /**
   * List Cash Books
   *
   * List all cash books owned by the current doctor.
   *
   * Args:
   * active_only: If True, only returns active books (default: True)
   * skip: Number of records to skip (pagination)
   * limit: Maximum records to return (pagination)
   *
   * Returns:
   * List of cash books with total count
   */
  public static "💰FinanceListCashBooks"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options?: Options<FinanceListCashBooksData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceListCashBooksResponses,
      FinanceListCashBooksErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Create Cash Book
   *
   * Create a new named cash book for the current doctor.
   *
   * A cash book is an independent ledger with its own running balance.
   * Doctors can maintain multiple books (e.g., Medicine, Equipment, General).
   *
   * Args:
   * name: Display name for the ledger (e.g., "Medicine Book")
   * description: Optional description of what this book tracks
   *
   * Returns:
   * The created cash book with ID
   *
   * Raises:
   * 400: Doctor must be an active user
   * 401: User must be authenticated
   */
  public static "💰FinanceCreateCashBook"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<FinanceCreateCashBookData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      FinanceCreateCashBookResponses,
      FinanceCreateCashBookErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Delete Cash Book
   *
   * Hard-delete a cash book.
   *
   * ⚠️ Deletes all associated transactions.
   * Prefer deactivating (is_active=False) for audit safety.
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: UUID of the cash book to delete
   *
   * Returns:
   * Success message
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceDeleteCashBook"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<FinanceDeleteCashBookData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      FinanceDeleteCashBookResponses,
      FinanceDeleteCashBookErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books/{cash_book_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Cash Book
   *
   * Retrieve a single cash book by ID.
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: UUID of the cash book
   *
   * Returns:
   * The cash book details
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceGetCashBook"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<FinanceGetCashBookData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceGetCashBookResponses,
      FinanceGetCashBookErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books/{cash_book_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update Cash Book
   *
   * Update a cash book's name, description, or active status.
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: UUID of the cash book
   * name: Optional new name
   * description: Optional new description
   * is_active: Optional active status
   *
   * Returns:
   * Updated cash book
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceUpdateCashBook"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<FinanceUpdateCashBookData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      FinanceUpdateCashBookResponses,
      FinanceUpdateCashBookErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books/{cash_book_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * List Custom Fields
   *
   * List custom field definitions for a cash book.
   *
   * Ordered by display_order ascending.
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: Target cash book UUID
   * active_only: If True, only returns active fields (default: True)
   *
   * Returns:
   * List of custom field definitions
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceListCustomFields"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceListCustomFieldsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceListCustomFieldsResponses,
      FinanceListCustomFieldsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books/{cash_book_id}/custom-fields",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Add Custom Field
   *
   * Add a custom field definition to a cash book.
   *
   * Custom fields allow capturing additional data per transaction.
   * Example: Medicine Book → supplier_name, invoice_number, expiry_date
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: Target cash book UUID
   * field_key: Machine-readable identifier (e.g., "supplier_name")
   * field_label: Human-readable label (e.g., "Supplier Name")
   * field_type: one of: text, number, date, boolean (default: text)
   * is_required: If True, field must be provided when creating transactions
   * display_order: Ascending sort order for UI
   *
   * Returns:
   * The created custom field definition
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   * 400: Field key already exists in this cash book
   */
  public static "💰FinanceAddCustomField"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<FinanceAddCustomFieldData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      FinanceAddCustomFieldResponses,
      FinanceAddCustomFieldErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books/{cash_book_id}/custom-fields",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Deactivate Custom Field
   *
   * Soft-delete a custom field (deactivate).
   *
   * Hidden from UI but historical values preserved.
   *
   * Args:
   * field_id: UUID of the custom field
   *
   * Returns:
   * Success message
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Field not found
   * 403: Field does not belong to current user's cash book
   */
  public static "💰FinanceDeactivateCustomField"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceDeactivateCustomFieldData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      FinanceDeactivateCustomFieldResponses,
      FinanceDeactivateCustomFieldErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/custom-fields/{field_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update Custom Field
   *
   * Update a custom field definition.
   *
   * Cannot change field_key; only label, type, required flag, and order.
   *
   * Args:
   * field_id: UUID of the custom field
   * field_label: New display label
   * field_type: New field type
   * is_required: New required status
   * display_order: New display order
   *
   * Returns:
   * Updated custom field
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Field not found
   * 403: Field does not belong to current user's cash book
   */
  public static "💰FinanceUpdateCustomField"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceUpdateCustomFieldData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      FinanceUpdateCustomFieldResponses,
      FinanceUpdateCustomFieldErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/custom-fields/{field_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * List Transactions
   *
   * List transactions for a cash book with optional filters.
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: Required - target cash book UUID
   * start_date: Optional - filter >= this date
   * end_date: Optional - filter <= this date
   * nature_code: Optional - filter by "CASH_IN" or "CASH_OUT"
   * category_code: Optional - filter by category code
   * include_deleted: If True, includes soft-deleted transactions
   * skip: Pagination offset
   * limit: Pagination limit
   *
   * Returns:
   * List of transactions with total count
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceListTransactions"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceListTransactionsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceListTransactionsResponses,
      FinanceListTransactionsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/transactions",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Create Transaction
   *
   * Record a new transaction in a cash book.
   *
   * Uses dynamic enum system for validation:
   * - nature_code: CASH_IN or CASH_OUT (from TransactionNature enum type)
   * - category_code: MEDICINE_PURCHASE, CONSULTATION, etc. (from TransactionCategory enum type)
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: Target cash book UUID
   * nature_code: "CASH_IN" or "CASH_OUT"
   * category_code: Transaction category code
   * amount: Positive decimal value
   * transaction_date: Date of transaction
   * remarks: Optional free-text note
   * custom_field_values: Optional dict of { field_key: value }
   *
   * Returns:
   * The created transaction with running balance
   *
   * Raises:
   * 400: Cash book not active, invalid nature/category, required fields missing
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   * 404: Cash book not found
   */
  public static "💰FinanceCreateTransaction"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceCreateTransactionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      FinanceCreateTransactionResponses,
      FinanceCreateTransactionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/transactions",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Soft Delete Transaction
   *
   * Soft-delete a transaction (mark as deleted but preserve data).
   *
   * Excluded from balance calculations going forward.
   * All subsequent transactions have balances recalculated.
   *
   * Args:
   * transaction_id: UUID of the transaction to delete
   *
   * Returns:
   * Success message
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Transaction not found or already deleted
   * 403: Transaction does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceSoftDeleteTransaction"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceSoftDeleteTransactionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      FinanceSoftDeleteTransactionResponses,
      FinanceSoftDeleteTransactionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/transactions/{transaction_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Transaction
   *
   * Retrieve a single transaction.
   *
   * Args:
   * transaction_id: UUID of the transaction
   *
   * Returns:
   * Transaction details
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Transaction not found
   * 403: Transaction does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceGetTransaction"<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<FinanceGetTransactionData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceGetTransactionResponses,
      FinanceGetTransactionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/transactions/{transaction_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update Transaction
   *
   * Update an existing transaction.
   *
   * If amount or nature changes, all subsequent transactions
   * in the same cash book have their balances recalculated.
   *
   * Args:
   * transaction_id: UUID of the transaction
   * amount: New amount (optional)
   * transaction_date: New date (optional)
   * nature_code: New nature (optional)
   * category_code: New category (optional)
   * remarks: New remarks (optional)
   * custom_field_values: Update custom field values (optional)
   *
   * Returns:
   * Updated transaction
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Transaction not found
   * 403: Transaction does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceUpdateTransaction"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceUpdateTransactionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      FinanceUpdateTransactionResponses,
      FinanceUpdateTransactionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/transactions/{transaction_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Cash Book Balance
   *
   * Get the current running balance for a cash book.
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: UUID of the cash book
   *
   * Returns:
   * Dict with current_balance (Decimal)
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceGetCashBookBalance"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceGetCashBookBalanceData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceGetCashBookBalanceResponses,
      FinanceGetCashBookBalanceErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books/{cash_book_id}/current-balance",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Cash Book Summary
   *
   * Get financial summary for a single cash book.
   *
   * Args:
   * cash_book_id: UUID of the cash book
   * start_date: Optional - only count transactions >= this date
   * end_date: Optional - only count transactions <= this date
   *
   * Returns:
   * Summary with totals and balances
   *
   * Raises:
   * 404: Cash book not found
   * 403: Cash book does not belong to current user
   */
  public static "💰FinanceGetCashBookSummary"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<FinanceGetCashBookSummaryData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceGetCashBookSummaryResponses,
      FinanceGetCashBookSummaryErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/finance/cash-books/{cash_book_id}/summary",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get Doctor Summary
   *
   * Get consolidated financial summary across ALL cash books for current doctor.
   *
   * Args:
   * start_date: Optional - only count transactions >= this date
   * end_date: Optional - only count transactions <= this date
   *
   * Returns:
   * Aggregated summary with per-book breakdown
   *
   * Raises:
   * None - returns empty summary if no books exist
   */
  public static "💰FinanceGetDoctorSummary"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<FinanceGetDoctorSummaryData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      FinanceGetDoctorSummaryResponses,
      FinanceGetDoctorSummaryErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({

export class __Medicines {
  /**
   * Read All Medicines
   *
   * Retrieve ALL medicines from catalog without any filters or pagination.
   * Useful for dropdowns, initial autocomplete load, or full catalog display.
   *

   * For large catalogs, use the paginated /medicines/ endpoint instead.
   */

export class OnsitePatientManagement {
  /**
   * Search onsite patients by phone or name
   *
   * Quick lookup for walk-in patients. Searches by phone (exact) or name (partial/fuzzy). Returns up to 10 matches sorted by relevance. Prevents accidentally creating duplicates for the same person with typos.
   */
  public static onsitePatientManagementSearchOnsitePatients<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options?: Options<
      OnsitePatientManagementSearchOnsitePatientsData,
      ThrowOnError
    >,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      OnsitePatientManagementSearchOnsitePatientsResponses,
      OnsitePatientManagementSearchOnsitePatientsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/onsite/search",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Quick-register a new walk-in patient
   *
   * Fast registration for new walk-in patients. Requires only full_name and phone. If CNIC is not provided, auto-generates a temporary CNIC (TEMP-...) that the doctor can update later. Gender defaults to 'unknown'.
   */
  public static onsitePatientManagementQuickRegisterPatient<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options: Options<
      OnsitePatientManagementQuickRegisterPatientData,
      ThrowOnError
    >,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      OnsitePatientManagementQuickRegisterPatientResponses,
      OnsitePatientManagementQuickRegisterPatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/onsite/quick-register",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get onsite patient details
   *
   * Retrieve a patient's full record for edit/review during onsite consultation.
   */
  public static onsitePatientManagementGetOnsitePatient<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options: Options<OnsitePatientManagementGetOnsitePatientData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      OnsitePatientManagementGetOnsitePatientResponses,
      OnsitePatientManagementGetOnsitePatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/onsite/{patient_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

export class OnsiteConsultation {
  /**
   * Complete onsite (walk-in) consultation in one request
   *
   * Atomically creates: patient (or reuses by phone), appointment (in_progress), case + case-taking, prescription with medicines (optional, supports quick-add), and follow-up scheduling (optional). Everything commits together or rolls back completely on any failure.
   */
  public static onsiteConsultationCreateOnsiteConsultation<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options: Options<
      OnsiteConsultationCreateOnsiteConsultationData,
      ThrowOnError
    >,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      OnsiteConsultationCreateOnsiteConsultationResponses,
      OnsiteConsultationCreateOnsiteConsultationErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/consultations/onsite",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }
}

export class __Patient {
  /**
   * Get patient profile
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** PatientBearer
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to authenticated patients only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Retrieve your own patient profile
   * - Returns complete profile including personal, medical, and doctor info
   * - Auto-populated with current patient's data
   *
   * **Returns:** Patient profile object
   *
   * **Use case:** Patient views their profile on dashboard
   */
  public static "🧍PatientGetPatientProfile"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<PatientGetPatientProfileData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      PatientGetPatientProfileResponses,
      unknown,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/me",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update your profile
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** PatientBearer
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to authenticated patients only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Update your own patient profile
   * - Supports selective field updates
   * - Protects critical fields (phone, doctor, gender)
   *
   * **Updatable Fields:**
   * - full_name, cnic, email, phone_secondary
   * - date_of_birth, residential_address, postal_address
   * - city, occupation, medical_history
   * - drug_allergies, family_history, current_medications, notes
   *
   * **Protected Fields:** phone, doctor_id, gender (contact support)
   *
   * **Use case:** Patient updates profile information
   */
  public static "🧍PatientUpdatePatientProfile"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PatientUpdatePatientProfileData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      PatientUpdatePatientProfileResponses,
      PatientUpdatePatientProfileErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/me/update",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update your password
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** PatientBearer
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to authenticated patients only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Change your login password securely
   * - Current password must match existing password
   * - New password minimum 6 characters
   *
   * **Security:**
   * - Uses bcrypt hashing (Argon2)
   * - Current password required for verification
   * - Cannot reuse current password
   *
   * **Use case:** Patient changes their login password
   */
  public static "🧍PatientUpdatePatientPassword"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PatientUpdatePatientPasswordData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).patch<
      PatientUpdatePatientPasswordResponses,
      PatientUpdatePatientPasswordErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/me/password",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get your appointments
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** PatientBearer
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to authenticated patients only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - List all your appointments (past and future)
   * - Filter by status (pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled)
   * - Sorted by date
   *
   * **Status Options:**
   * - pending: Awaiting confirmation
   * - confirmed: Confirmed appointment
   * - completed: Appointment completed
   * - cancelled: Appointment cancelled
   *
   * **Use case:** Patient views all their appointments
   */
  public static "🧍PatientGetPatientAppointments"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<PatientGetPatientAppointmentsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      PatientGetPatientAppointmentsResponses,
      PatientGetPatientAppointmentsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/me/appointments",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get upcoming appointments
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** PatientBearer
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to authenticated patients only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Get your upcoming appointments
   * - Filter for next N days (default 30)
   * - Only scheduled and confirmed appointments
   * - Sorted by date
   *
   * **Query Parameters:**
   * - days: Number of days ahead to check (1-365, default 30)
   *
   * **Use case:** Patient sees upcoming appointments on dashboard
   */
  public static "🧍PatientGetUpcomingPatientAppointments"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(
    options?: Options<PatientGetUpcomingPatientAppointmentsData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      PatientGetUpcomingPatientAppointmentsResponses,
      PatientGetUpcomingPatientAppointmentsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/me/appointments/upcoming",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get appointment details
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** PatientBearer
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to authenticated patients only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Get details of a specific appointment
   * - Only your own appointments visible
   * - Returns full appointment information
   *
   * **Use case:** Patient views appointment details
   */
  public static "🧍PatientGetPatientAppointmentDetail"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PatientGetPatientAppointmentDetailData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      PatientGetPatientAppointmentDetailResponses,
      PatientGetPatientAppointmentDetailErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/me/appointments/{appointment_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Cancel appointment
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** PatientBearer
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to authenticated patients only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Cancel one of your appointments
   * - Only your own appointments can be cancelled
   * - Appointment status changed to "cancelled"
   *
   * **Restrictions:**
   * - Cannot cancel appointments that are already completed or cancelled
   * - Doctor may need to approve cancellation (based on clinic policy)
   *
   * **Use case:** Patient cancels an appointment
   */
  public static "🧍PatientCancelPatientAppointment"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PatientCancelPatientAppointmentData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      PatientCancelPatientAppointmentResponses,
      PatientCancelPatientAppointmentErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/me/appointments/{appointment_id}/cancel",
      ...options,
    });
  }
}

export class Staff {
  /**
   * List all patients
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to doctors and staff only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - List all patients assigned to the current doctor
   * - Search by name, phone, email, CNIC, or city
   * - Filter by payment status or gender
   * - Pagination support
   *
   * **Response:** List of patient records with count
   *
   * **Use case:** Doctor views patient list in dashboard
   */
  public static adminReadPatients<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options?: Options<DoctorStaffAdminReadPatientsData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      DoctorStaffAdminReadPatientsResponses,
      DoctorStaffAdminReadPatientsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Create new patient
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to doctors only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Create a new patient record
   * - Auto-assigns patient to current doctor
   * - Validates unique email and CNIC per doctor
   * - Initializes patient account
   *
   * **Required Fields:**
   * - full_name
   * - phone
   * - date_of_birth
   * - gender
   * - cnic
   *
   * **Use case:** Doctor creates new patient profile
   */
  public static adminCreatePatient<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<DoctorStaffAdminCreatePatientData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      DoctorStaffAdminCreatePatientResponses,
      DoctorStaffAdminCreatePatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Delete patient
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to doctors only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Delete a patient record permanently
   * - Only doctors can delete their own patients
   * - Cascading delete removes related data (appointments, cases, etc.)
   *
   * ⚠️ **Warning:** This action cannot be undone
   *
   * **Use case:** Doctor removes a patient from system
   */
  public static adminDeletePatient<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<DoctorStaffAdminDeletePatientData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      DoctorStaffAdminDeletePatientResponses,
      DoctorStaffAdminDeletePatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/{patient_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get patient by ID
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to doctors only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Retrieve detailed information for a specific patient
   * - Only doctors can access their own patients
   * - Returns complete patient profile
   *
   * **Use case:** Doctor views detailed patient profile
   */
  public static adminReadPatient<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<DoctorStaffAdminReadPatientData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      DoctorStaffAdminReadPatientResponses,
      DoctorStaffAdminReadPatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/{patient_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update patient
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to doctors only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Update patient information
   * - Only doctors can update their own patients
   * - Validates unique CNIC and email
   * - Supports partial updates
   *
   * **Use case:** Doctor updates patient details
   */
  public static adminUpdatePatient<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<DoctorStaffAdminUpdatePatientData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).put<
      DoctorStaffAdminUpdatePatientResponses,
      DoctorStaffAdminUpdatePatientErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/patients/{patient_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Get patient statistics
   *
   * 🔐 **Authentication Required:** DoctorOAuth2
   *
   * This endpoint is accessible to doctors only.
   *
   * **Functionality:**
   * - Get statistics about a patient
   * - Includes: case count, appointment count, medical history summary
   * - Only doctors can view their own patients' stats
   *
   * **Use case:** Doctor views patient analytics dashboard
   */
  public static adminGetPatientStats<ThrowOnError extends boolean = false>(
    options: Options<DoctorStaffAdminGetPatientStatsData, ThrowOnError>,
  ) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      DoctorStaffAdminGetPatientStatsResponses,

      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],

export class __Prescriptions {
  /**
   * Read Prescriptions
   *
   * Retrieve prescriptions with filtering options.
   */
  public static "📋PrescriptionsReadPrescriptions"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options?: Options<PrescriptionsReadPrescriptionsData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options?.client ?? client).get<
      PrescriptionsReadPrescriptionsResponses,
      PrescriptionsReadPrescriptionsErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/prescriptions/",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Create Prescription
   *
   * Create new prescription with medicines.
   *
   * Supports two ways to add medicines:
   * 1. Use existing medicine from catalog (provide medicine_id)
   * 2. Quick-add new medicine (provide new_medicine details)
   *
   * If medicine already exists in catalog, it will be reused instead of creating duplicate.
   *
   * **Auto follow-up scheduling (NEW):**
   * Include an optional `follow_up_schedule` block to atomically create a scheduled
   * follow-up alongside the prescription.  Three date modes are supported:
   *
   * - Explicit date:   `{ "follow_up_date": "2025-04-15" }`
   * - Auto-calculate:  `{ "auto_calculate": true }` (requires `duration_days` on prescription)
   * - Omit both:       backend defaults to prescription_date + 30 days
   *
   * If `follow_up_schedule` is omitted entirely, no follow-up is created (existing behaviour).
   */
  public static "📋PrescriptionsCreatePrescription"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PrescriptionsCreatePrescriptionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).post<
      PrescriptionsCreatePrescriptionResponses,
      PrescriptionsCreatePrescriptionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/prescriptions/",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * Delete Prescription
   *
   * Delete a prescription.
   * Automatically deletes related follow-ups and associated audit records if any exist.
   */
  public static "📋PrescriptionsDeletePrescription"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PrescriptionsDeletePrescriptionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).delete<
      PrescriptionsDeletePrescriptionResponses,
      PrescriptionsDeletePrescriptionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/prescriptions/{prescription_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Read Prescription
   *
   * Get prescription by ID with medicines.
   */
  public static "📋PrescriptionsReadPrescription"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PrescriptionsReadPrescriptionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).get<
      PrescriptionsReadPrescriptionResponses,
      PrescriptionsReadPrescriptionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/prescriptions/{prescription_id}",
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Update Prescription
   *
   * Update a prescription.
   */
  public static "📋PrescriptionsUpdatePrescription"<
    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,
  >(options: Options<PrescriptionsUpdatePrescriptionData, ThrowOnError>) {
    return (options.client ?? client).put<
      PrescriptionsUpdatePrescriptionResponses,
      PrescriptionsUpdatePrescriptionErrors,
      ThrowOnError
    >({
      security: [{ scheme: "bearer", type: "http" }],
      url: "/prescriptions/{prescription_id}",
      ...options,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...options.headers,
      },
    });
  }

  /**

   *
   * Get prescription details for printing.

    ThrowOnError extends boolean = false,

/**

 * Schema for creating transaction
 */

  /**
   * Cash Book Id
   */
